summary: Decompiled and data-reconstructed significant portions of the Old Pupupu stage file. The PR added Old Pupupu StageData/static tables, migrated stage state out of gv.unk into typed GroundVars, implemented the previously stubbed grOldPupupu_80210D10 and grOldPupupu_802113E0, and brought fn_802112F4 to 100% according to the decomp.dev report. Evidence is mostly diff and bot metrics; the PR body was empty and there were no human review comments.

key_files.role: primary Old Pupupu decomp work: new data symbols, includes, ground-var migration, implemented 80210D10/802113E0, fn_802112F4 cleanup
added grOldPupupu_GroundVars and grOldPupupu_GroundVars2 to the Ground union
minor line-wrap/formatting changes only in the shown diff
minor line-wrap/formatting change only in the shown diff

what_changed: Added Old Pupupu static data in groldpupupu.c: grOp_803E673C = "/GrOp.dat", StageData grOp_803E6748 for OLDPUPUPU, spawn descriptor table grOp_803E67B0, phase table grOp_803E67D8, side vector table grOp_803E67E4, and duplicate animation index arrays grOp_804D48C8/grOp_804D48D0/grOp_804D48D8.
Expanded the grOp_804D6A98 parameter struct with x2C and x30, used later as random range bounds in grOldPupupu_802113E0.

Replaced many gp->gv.unk accesses with gp->gv.oldpupupu or gp->gv.oldpupupu2 and added matching structs in types.h: grOldPupupu_GroundVars with s32 fields xC4 through xE0 and grOldPupupu_GroundVars2 with s16 xC4/xC6.

Implemented grOldPupupu_80210D10, which decrements a respawn timer, uses Camera_800307D0 and Ground_801C0498 to choose off-screen spawn placement, randomizes spawn descriptors/count, calls grOldPupupu_802108B4_noinline(2), sets JObj translation, starts animation with grAnime_801C7FF8, and unhides a child JObj via Ground_801C3FA4/JOBJ_HIDDEN.

Implemented grOldPupupu_802113E0 as a large Old Pupupu state machine over xC8 states 0/1/2, controlling animation transitions, random timers, side changes via ftLib_800864A8, synchronization to Ground_801C2BA4(1), wind/velocity state xDC, camera call Camera_80030E44, effect call lb_80011A50, and audio call lbAudioAx_800237A8.
Cleaned fn_802112F4 by using GET_GROUND(gobj), switching on gp->gv.oldpupupu.xDC, and applying left/right x velocity only when grOldPupupu_8021128C reports the fighter is inside configured bounds.
Added needed includes for implemented logic, including camera, ftdevice, grdisplay, lbaudio_ax, baselib debug/gobjgxlink/gobjproc, and placeholder.h.

The merge commit message records staged matching attempts for grOldPupupu_802108B4, grOldPupupu_8021119C, fn_802112F4, grOldPupupu_80210D10, and grOldPupupu_802113E0, plus fixes for offset issues and ground-var migration.

decomp.dev reported 2 new matches: groldpupupu .sdata2 to 100% and fn_802112F4 to 100%; it also reported improvements for grOldPupupu_802113E0 to 87.16%, grOldPupupu_80210D10 to 85.46%, .data to 86.86%, and .sdata to 80.88%.
grOldKongo and grKinokoRoute changes visible in the slice are formatting/line wrapping, not substantive decomp changes.
smart_moves: Migrating Old Pupupu state out of gv.unk into stage-specific GroundVars made the code more readable and avoided offset-cast noise such as *(s16*) &gp->gv.unk.xC4.
Using a second struct, grOldPupupu_GroundVars2, preserved the fact that one Old Pupupu object interprets the same ground-var area as an s16 timer rather than the main s32 state machine.
Reconstructing data tables instead of hardcoding values improved data matching: the bot credited .sdata2 reaching 100% and .data/.sdata moving substantially upward.
The noinline wrapper grOldPupupu_802108B4_noinline is a targeted codegen tactic for grOldPupupu_80210D10: it forces a call boundary even though the wrapper simply returns grOldPupupu_802108B4(arg0).
The fn_802112F4 cleanup shows that tiny access-pattern changes, such as GET_GROUND(gobj) and removing an artificial temporary/PAD_STACK, can finish an almost-matched function.
The implementation keeps unknown fields as offset names where semantics are not proven, while still giving the containing structs and typedefs meaningful Old Pupupu names.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, adding typed GroundVars is often a prerequisite for matching larger callbacks and should be done before trying to polish every control-flow detail.
If different stage objects share the Ground union but interpret offsets differently, model that explicitly with separate union members instead of forcing one struct or using casts.
Data matching may require separate static symbols for identical-looking arrays; do not assume duplicate tables can be collapsed if the original binary stores them separately.
Large stage hazard state machines often synchronize state into another Ground object via Ground_801C2BA4; matching attempts should track both the controlling object and the display/helper object.
Camera-bounded random spawns can match better when expressed with explicit camera left/center/right locals, HSD_Randi/HSD_Randf, and original-looking float constants rather than simplified algebra.
Machine-reported percentages should be recorded precisely: this PR improved grOldPupupu_80210D10 and grOldPupupu_802113E0 but did not make them 100% in the bot report.
naming_conventions: Stage functions use the existing address-suffixed form grOldPupupu_80210D10, grOldPupupu_802113E0, fn_802112F4; the PR did not invent semantic function names.
Old Pupupu data symbols use the grOp_ prefix, e.g. grOp_803E6748, grOp_803E67B0, grOp_804D48C8.
The stage data path string is named grOp_803E673C and contains "/GrOp.dat"; StageData grOp_803E6748 uses enum OLDPUPUPU.
Typed ground vars are named grOldPupupu_GroundVars and grOldPupupu_GroundVars2, with Ground union fields oldpupupu and oldpupupu2.
The spawn table typedef is grOldPupupuSpawnDesc, but its fields remain x0/x1/x2 because their exact meanings were not proven in the diff.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma dont_inline around grOldPupupu_802108B4_noinline to prevent inlining at a sensitive callsite.
Used PAD_STACK(0x10) in grOldPupupu_80210D10, indicating stack layout was part of that partial match.
Changed fn_802112F4 from a manual gobj->user_data temporary to GET_GROUND(gobj), which coincides with the bot-reported 100% match for that function.
Added x2C/x30 to the static parameter struct to fix later field offsets used by rand_range in grOldPupupu_802113E0.
Recovered static .data/.sdata/.sdata2 objects, including Vec3 constants and duplicate animation tables, to improve data-section matching.
Kept float constants and ordering visible in spawn/camera math, such as 200.0F, 50.0F, 10.0F, -150.0F, 40.0F, and the HSD_Randf expression.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice, and the PR body was empty, so reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 matched code 65.05% (+0.01%, +236 bytes) and matched data 38.57% (+0.00%, +56 bytes).

decomp-dev bot listed new matches for main/melee/gr/groldpupupu .sdata2 at 100.00% and fn_802112F4 at 100.00%, plus partial improvements for grOldPupupu_802113E0, grOldPupupu_80210D10, .data, and .sdata.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish grOldPupupu_80210D10 or grOldPupupu_802113E0 after the 85.46%/87.16% bot-reported state.
Search other stage files for gv.unk accesses that could be migrated to typed GroundVars like oldpupupu/oldpupupu2.
Look for later semantic renames of grOldPupupuSpawnDesc fields x0/x1/x2 and grOldPupupu_GroundVars fields xC4-xE0.
Compare grOp_804D48A0/A8/B0 with grOp_804D48C8/D0/D8 to confirm why duplicate static animation tables are required for data matching.
Audit other stage spawn managers for the same noinline-wrapper tactic around object creation helpers.
